rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple consistency issues and proposes specific fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty in conclusions but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns like overgeneralization.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't annotate changes with sources or reasons.
